arts.ttl: Juventus Eye Osimhen as Vlahovic’s Successor: A €75 Million Bid Expected
arts.sum: Juventus are already looking beyond Dusan Vlahovic, with the Serbian striker's recent bench appearances hinting at an impending departure. As the club celebrates three years since Vlahovic's arrival, plans for his exit are already in motion, with a separation expected between July and August. arts.ttl: Two Superstars Desperate to Leave Juventus After Thiago Motta Fallout
arts.sum: Dusan Vlahovic and Douglas Luiz are reportedly determined to cut ties with Juventus after falling out of favor with Thiago Motta. According to La Repubblica via Ilbianconero, both players are unhappy with their current status at the Allianz Stadium and want out.
